titleStmt.title: SII 24.193: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 193. (A.R. No. 77 of 1936-37.) IV PRĀKĀRA, SOUTH WALL, RIGHT OF ENTRANCE, WEST END.

summary.p: Registers the uḷvari issued by the king at the instance of Aiyyaṉ Maḻavarāyaṉ for the tax-free village Kumaranambinallūr newly formed and granted to the temple by Nāvāyaṉ Koṇḍanambi of Kuḷamūkku, a horse-dealer (kudiraichcheṭṭi) of Malaimaṇḍalam, for worship and offerings. Mentions Iraṭṭakulakālapuram from which a portion of the land was separated to form the new village.

Aiyyaṉ Maḻavarāyaṉ at whose instance the lands in question were exempted from tax and Araiyaṉ Viratamuḍittāṉ alias Pallavarāyaṉ of Chakrapāṇinallūr in Śevvirukkai-nāḍu are well-known to be high officers who served under Māṟavarmaṉ Sundarapāṇḍya II (A.D. 1232-49) (S.I.I., Vol. V, No. 448) and therefore this inscription which is dated in the third year opposite to the eleventh (A.D. 1245-46) may be assigned to him.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
[svasti śrīḥ .*] tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ ko� pāṇṭikulapativaḷanāṭṭu viḷānāṭṭut tiruvaraṅkattu Aḻakiya ma[ṇavāḷap perumāḷ koyilt tiruppa ḷukku Ivvaḻakiya maṇavāḷap perumāḷukkut tiruppaṭimāṟṟukkum m nivantaṅkaḷukkum malaimaṇṭalattu kutiraic ceṭṭikaḷil kuḷamukku nāvāyaṉ koṇṭa nampi teṉkaḷavaḻināṭṭu muṭikoṇṭa ṭiyapurattu pāṇṭavatūtaṉ naṅkaṉāṉa tulaiyāta celvaṉ pakkal koyil nilaiyāṉa
Iraṭṭakulakālapurattu paṟṟil vilaikoṇṭa velaṅkālum kūṭṭa ṭai mayilāṭikaḷum kaḷḷarum pakkal vilai koṇṭa kuṟṟip paṉaṅkuḷamum pa[ṉak ] kuḷa māṉa nānātecinallūr mayi ḷḷarum la nālāya ṇṭa meṟ yum Āka Ikkuḷaṅka laippaṭi nāṉkellaikkuḷpaṭṭa nirnilamum karuñcey puṉceyum nattamun toṭṭamum kuḷamum kuḷap parippum Uṭpaṭṭa nilattil paḻantevatāṉam paḷḷiccantam maṭap
puṟamum nikki nikkiyuḷḷa nilam paḻamper tavuntu Ūril piṟi mutalāy Ororu puravākki Eḻakapperumāḷ Ūruṇi vaṭakarai Aṭukka patiṉoṉṟāvatiṉetir muṉṟāvatu mutal kumaranampinallūreṉṉum perāl kaṭamaiyum Antarāyamum viṉiyokamum taruvatāṉa Accum veṭṭipāṭṭamum pañcupili cantu vikkirakappeṟu poṉ variyum maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭaṉavum Uṭpaṭa Ivvāṇṭu mutal tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāyiṟuppatā
kavum Iṟukkumiṭattu I nilaiyāṉa ka]ṭamai Iṟukkum kolāl nilamaḷantup payir pāttu viḷainta nilattukku kaṭamaiyum Antarāyamum viṉiyokamum taruvatāṉa Accum kāriyavārācciyum veṭṭi pāṭṭamum pañcu piliyum cantuvikkirakappeṟum poṉvariyum maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭaṉavum Uṭpaṭa māttāṟ kācu kālum kaṇṭa tevaṉāl nellu mukkalamum kuṟuvai viḷainta nilattukku Ivvaricaiyil Oṉṟu mukkā
lum Aiṟpaci viḷainta nilattukku Eḷ varaku tiḷai viḷainta nilattukkum Oṉṟu kālum puṉ māttār tiramamum Ivvāṇṭu mu tāka Iṟai veṇumeṉṟu Aiyyaṉ maḻa c coṉṉamaiyil Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷapperumāḷukkut tiruppaṭimāṟṟu Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nivantaṅ kaḷukku koṇṭa
vatu vilai koṇ ṭṭattār � ṭai mayilāṭikaḷum kaḷḷarum pakkal vilai koṇṭa kuṟṟip paṉaṅkuḷamum Innāṉātecinallūr mayilāṭikaḷum kaḷḷarum pakkal nāvāyaṉ kaṇṭanampi vilaikoṇṭa ṭam lai Ōlaippaṭi nāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nirnilamum karuñceyyum nattamum toṭṭamu muṭpaṭṭa nilattil paḻan te
vatāṉap paḷḷiccantamuṭpaṭa nikki nikkiyuḷḷa nilam paḻam per tavintu Ūril piṟi mutalāya O(ru)roru puravākki Eḻakap perumāḷ Ūruṇi vaṭakaraiyaṭukka Ivvāṇṭu mutal kumaranampinallūr Eṉ ṉum perāl Ūrceytu Ivvūrkkaṭamaiyum Antarāyamum viṉiyokamum taru vatāṉa Accum kāriyavārācciyum veṭṭipāṭṭamum pañcupili canti vikkirakap peṟum poṉvariyum maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭaṉavum Uṭpaṭa Ivvāṇṭu
mutal tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāyiṟuppatākavum Iṟukku Iraṭṭa kula kālapuram paṟṟil Iṟukkum kolāl nilamaḷantu payirpāttu viḷainta nilat tuk kaṭamaiyum Antarāyamum viṉiyokamun taruvatāṉa Accum kāriyavārāycci yum veṭṭipāṭṭamum pañcupili cantivikkirakappeṟum poṉ variyum maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭaṉavum Uṭpaṭa māttāṟ kācu kālum kaṇṭa tevaṉāl nellu muk kalamum kuṟuvai viḷainta nilattukku Ivvaricaiyil
Oṉṟu mukkālum Aippacikkuṟuvai viḷainta nilattukku O m tulāviṟaittu viḷainta Eḷ varaku viḷainta nilattukku Oṉṟu kālum ca nilattukku māttāl m Araiyumāka Iṟuppatākavum Iṭṭu variyilāreḻuttiṭṭa Uḷvariyum naṅkeḻviyun taraccoṉ ṉom kai rātittavaṟ celvatāka kallilum cempilum veṭṭivittukkoḷka . Ivai Arumperkkūṟṟattu putupper
kuḷattāḻvāṉ Āṇṭapirāṉ Aḻaka ḻuttu yāṇṭu 10 1 vatu nāḷ Ā Ivai cevvirukkai kkarapāṇinallūr Ara viratamuṭittāṉāṉa pallavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai cevvirukkai nāṭṭu kāñci kuṟucci Araiyaṉ I ṉāṉ sti śrī .
Digital edition of SII 24.193 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
